entry.title: How to add your game to Twitch categories ?

link.title: How to add your game to Twitch categories ?

entry.summary: Have you ever wondered how to add your game to the Twitch categories list ? This article is there to guide you to do this! First, you need to know that as stated on Twitch Documentation, you can’t add directly your game to Twitch. They use a service they (Amazon) developed to give open data sources about games called IGDB. To add your game to IGDB, you first need to login with Twitch, then go...

entry.title: 1 year after launch: Figures about Alchemistry

link.title: 1 year after launch: Figures about Alchemistry

entry.summary: This post was initialy written on Twitter and Mastodon as a thread. 1 year and two months ago (March 7th, 2022), Alchemistry released on Steam. Now that I precisely have the figures up to March 2023, I’m going to do a summary of that first year or so. The game launched with ~1.8k wishlists, which is a lot compared to my previous game (~400), thanks to Steam Next Fest (2 weeks before launch)...

entry.title: How to setup official controller configration with Steam Input ?

link.title: How to setup official controller configration with Steam Input ?

entry.summary: It’s a thing that I had to do while updating Alchemistry to be Steam Deck compatible, and documentation wasn’t helping me, because there are plenty of use cases. So here we are, here’s a small tutorial on how to set up an official controller configuration based on your or a community-created one. Create your configuration (Steam Deck or Big Picture version) To access controller configuration...

entry.title: How to install steam demo along with original game on the same Steam Account ?

link.title: How to install steam demo along with original game on the same Steam Account ?

entry.summary: Get your demo app ID You can get your demo app ID using SteamWorks, or using Steamdb using the search bar, in the results: Open steam console To open steam console, type steam://open/console in your browser adress bar Install game demo using command Type app_install DEMO_ID while replacing DEMO_ID by your app id, for example app_install 1766570. Have fun! You should now have both game ...

entry.title: How did steam Next Fest saved Alchemistry's marketing ?

link.title: How did steam Next Fest saved Alchemistry's marketing ?

entry.summary: During February 2022, with Alchemistry I participated for the first time in the Steam Next Fest, a Steam event that highlights hundred of demos from the game that will release in the following 6 months. I hoped to earn a few more wishlists, but I got far more than I expected. Here’s a small article describing my journey during this crazy week. Layout The first thing to talk about is the Next ...
